sections.title: Without at least 100 coins in your inventory

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: Well met, fellow adventurer! How can I help you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who are you?

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: How frightfully rude of me, my dear [chap/girl]. My name is Odovacar and I work for that excellent enterprise, the Bank of Gielinor.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: If you work for the bank, what are you doing here?

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: As part of our ongoing service to provide you, the customer, with an absolutely world-class banking experience, we are investigating the option of opening a chain of travelling banks. These will provide you, our

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: esteemed customer, with the convenience of having banking facilities where they will be of optimum use to you. Such as here!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Huh?

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: I am the first of a new generation of travelling bankers that will wander the perilous areas of the world to provide you, the valued customer, with a bank when you need it most!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So I can access my bank account simply by talking to you?

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: Absolutely correct, dear [sir/lady]. I must warn you, however, that due to the significantly increased overheads of an enterprise such as this, there is a small bank charge of 100gp every time you want to access your account.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I don't have the money. Can I get it from my bank?

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: It's not that I don't trust you to pay afterwards, old [chap/girl], but as the old adage goes, 'money comes before friends'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's preposterous! I'm not paying to withdraw my own money!

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: I'm sorry to hear that, [sir/madam]. If you should reconsider, because I believe this service offers excellent value for money, do not hesitate to contact me.

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary funds with you at this time so I can't allow you to access your account. Please come again, when you have 100 gold to cover the fee.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to check my PIN settings.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'd like to collect items.

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: I'm afraid you don't have the necessary funds with you at this time so I can't allow you to collect your items. Please come again, when you have 100 gold to cover the fee.

sections.title: With at least 100 coins in your inventory

sections.title: When using coins, platinum tokens, or noted items on Odovacar

lines.speaker: Odovacar
lines.text: Sorry, I don't perform that service.
